control.description-key: Opens or previews a SharePoint document, folder, or document library with the signed-in user permissions enforced. Inline preview and folder browsing use Microsoft Graph and require an Entra app Client ID; without it the control opens the document in SharePoint.

property.name: boundValue
property.display-name-key: SharePoint document, folder, or library URL
property.description-key: Bind to the text or URL column that stores the SharePoint link. A file link previews the document; a folder or library link opens a browsable file list.

property.name: showInlinePreview
property.description-key: When On, shows a Preview button that renders the document (or, for a folder/library URL, a browsable file list) in the form using your own SharePoint permissions via Microsoft Graph. Requires the Client ID below and admin consent. Without a Client ID the control opens or downloads the document in SharePoint.

property.name: clientId
property.display-name-key: Entra app Client ID (for inline preview)
property.description-key: Application (client) ID of the registered single-page app used to call Microsoft Graph. Leave blank to disable inline preview; the control still opens and downloads in SharePoint.

property.name: tenantId
property.description-key: Leave blank for multi-tenant (organizations). Enter your Directory (tenant) ID GUID or domain for single-tenant. Used to build the sign-in authority.

property.name: redirectUri
property.description-key: Optional. Must be a registered single-page-app redirect URI on the app registration. Blank uses the current app origin, which is usually correct.

property.name: autoExpand
property.description-key: When On, the preview (or folder browser) opens automatically without clicking Preview. Uses a silent sign-in if the user already has an active Microsoft 365 session in this browser; otherwise most browsers block the automatic sign-in pop-up, so the user is asked to click Preview once to sign in manually. Requires the Client ID above.

property.name: previewHeight
property.description-key: Pixel height of the inline preview or the folder/library browser. Default 600.

property.name: browserPageSize
property.description-key: Number of files/folders to load per page when browsing a document library (25-200). Default 100.

property.name: blockSharePointSharingLinks
property.description-key: When On, blocks downloading sharing links that bypass per-user SharePoint permissions. Leave On unless you intentionally use sharing links.

property.name: showOpenInWindow
property.description-key: Show a button that opens the document in a focused popup window.

property.name: showNewTab
property.description-key: Show a button that opens the document in a new browser tab.

property.name: showDownload
property.description-key: Show a button that downloads the document. Blocked for sharing links when the option above is On.
